heroAlt: Professional grooming for your beloved pets, with loving care

notice.title: Important pricing information
notice.body: We can’t give an exact price without meeting your pet first. Rates depend on breed, size, services, and styling. Prices are based on standard size; oversized pets may differ. Grooming does not include heavy de-matting or knot removal. We’ll always confirm a quote before we start.

groomingPolicy.intro: At Pets Ground, we care about health, safety, and comfort. Please read our gentle house rules:
groomingPolicy.closingLine1: We want every visit to feel safe, calm, and happy.
groomingPolicy.closingLine2: Questions? Reach out anytime — thank you for trusting us with your pet.

items.title: Cancellations
items.body: Reschedule or cancel at least 24 hours ahead when you can — it helps us welcome other pets warmly. For anything else, WhatsApp or call us at 011-6066 3211.

items.title: Pricing
items.body:
We quote after meeting your pet. Price reflects breed, size, services, and style. Standard-size pricing applies; extra-large pets may differ. Grooming does not include heavy de-matting or knot removal.

Returning guests usually keep the same price unless we let you know otherwise.

items.title: Punctuality
items.body: Please arrive on time so every pet gets their full pampering window. Life happens — we allow a 10-minute grace period. Running late? Let us know early. After the grace period, we may treat the slot as walk-in and fit you in when we can.

items.title: Fleas & ticks
items.body: To protect every guest, we can’t groom pets with active flea or tick infestations.

items.title: Aggressive behaviour
items.body: For dogs who bite or show unsafe aggression, we may need to decline service — everyone’s safety comes first.

items.title: Cat grooming
items.body:
Cats deserve extra gentleness. We don’t use sedation. If your cat is very stressed, fearful of water or dryers, or scratches or bites, we may stop for their wellbeing and ours.

We only proceed when grooming stays a kind experience for your cat and our team.

items.title: Vaccinations
items.body: Pets should be up to date on required vaccines (e.g. rabies, distemper, parvovirus). We may ask for proof.

items.title: Health conditions
items.body: Tell us about illnesses, allergies, or special care — we’ll adjust with love.

items.title: Style requests
items.body: Share your wishes clearly; results can vary with coat and condition.

items.title: Matted coats
items.body: Severe mats may need a shave. Regular brushing keeps coats fluffy and comfy.

items.title: Payment
items.body: Payment is due when service ends. We accept Cash, PayNow, SGQR, NETS, and American Express. NETS or Amex requires a minimum of RM20.
